$comment: Reference manifest for go-skill-scanner. Copy and customize for each Skill.

skill.name: example-skill
skill.description: Reference manifest showing all available capability declarations.
skill.author: team@example.com

capabilities.$comment: Declare EVERY capability the Skill uses. Undeclared capabilities = HIGH severity finding.

network.$comment: block_private_ranges prevents SSRF attacks by blocking RFC1918 addresses.

filesystem.$comment: Disable filesystem access unless strictly required. Each path is a glob pattern.

subprocess.$comment: Subprocess execution is HIGH risk. Requires explicit security review.

environment_variables.$comment: Restrict env var access to prevent token/secret exfiltration.

llm_calls.$comment: Nested LLM calls must be declared to prevent prompt injection chains.

code_execution.$comment: Dynamic code execution (eval, exec, importlib) is CRITICAL risk.

data_handling.$comment: Set processes_pii: true to trigger automatic PII obfuscation before LLM analysis.

scanner_policy.$comment: Deployment-level policy overrides. Can be set globally in scanner config.
